audit_items.proof_trace: All error paths in nfp_abm_qdisc_alloc correctly free allocated memory: kcalloc failure falls to err_free_qdisc (kfree qdisc), radix_tree_insert failure hits err_free_child_tbl then err_free_qdisc (kfree both). On success, qdiscs are tracked in alink->qdiscs radix tree and unconditionally freed via nfp_abm_qdisc_free (kfree qdisc->children + kfree qdisc) when TC DESTROY callbacks arrive. nfp_abm_qdisc_destroy (L418-420) contains a benign use-after-free pointer comparison (qdisc used after nfp_abm_qdisc_free) but this does not cause a leak; the memory is already freed.
